narrative:
Granger TWP township has 3,583 registered voters, with 49.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 36.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.2%, a pronounced Republican lean of 22.3 percentage points.
